MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: STEVEN L. ROBINSON'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (FOR GEORGE JACOB)

No appearances. The court rules as follows: The unopposed motion for leave to withdraw as counsel is granted. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

** After hearing, counsel informed via telephone that no proposed order was received. He confirmed he will submit a proposed order **

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Continued To Apr-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Continued To Dec-17-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Steven Robinson, Esq. 415-434-8700 Law Offices of Joseph Alioto & Angela Alioto for Plaintiff.
Lynne Charlotte Hermle, Esq. 650-614-7400 Orrick Herrington Sutcliffe LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Robinson contests the tentative ruling. Mr. Hermle argues. After full argument,
the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BAY.ORG DBA BAY ECOTARIUM AND/OR AQUARIUM OF THE BAY's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Defendant BAY.org's motion to compel arbitration is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details) )

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
